creator: krion@FreeBSD.org
text:
I couldn't properly apply the patch, please redo:

===> Fetching all distfiles required by slock-1.4 for building
===>  Extracting for slock-1.4
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for slock-1.4.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for slock-1.4
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for slock-1.4
6 out of 7 hunks failed--saving rejects to slock.c.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-slock.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-config.mk applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1
